message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for obstruction certificates (FRX-14.3) and parser evidence indexer

obstruction_certificate.rs (+232 lines, FRX-14.3):
  Tests for transforming coherence violations from Global Coherence Checker
  into minimal, evidence-linked obstruction certificates. Validates ranked
  fallback action selection (isolate > degrade > split > escalate),
  deterministic certificate generation, and evidence linking. Clone equality,
  serde roundtrips, and boundary condition tests.

parser_evidence_indexer.rs (+224 lines):
  Tests for indexing parser run manifests and structured event logs into
  deterministic cross-run views. Validates replay pointer lookups, regression
  correlation, fail-closed schema migration behavior, and canonical indexed
  event row construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
